records.question: Which teams have the name exactly Los Angeles Galaxy?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
WHERE team.name = 'Los Angeles Galaxy'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Team_id FROM team WHERE Name = 'Los Angeles Galaxy'

records.question: Which teams have draft pick numbers of at least 4 in seasons played where the country is exactly Isle of Man?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.country_name = 'Isle of Man' AND match_season.draft_pick_number >= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
JOIN match_season ms ON t.Team_id = ms.Team
JOIN country c ON ms.Country = c.Country_id
WHERE ms.Draft_Pick_Number >= 4
AND c.Country_name = 'Isle of Man'

records.question: Which teams named Miami Fusion have players with a total win-loss record of 6–4, a singles win-loss of 6–3, and who played exactly 4 years during 2003–2004 and 2010–2011?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.total_wl = '6–4' AND player.singles_wl = '6–3' AND player.years_played = '4 (2003–2004, 2010–2011)' AND team.name = 'Miami Fusion'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
WHERE t.Name = 'Miami Fusion'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player p
    WHERE p.Team = t.Team_id
    AND p.Total_WL = '6–4'
    AND p.Singles_WL = '6–3'
    AND p.Years_Played = '4 (2003–2004, 2010–2011)'
)

records.question: Which teams have Cho Soong-Jae (630) as a player with a 1–0 singles record and a 2–0 total record, played in Florida International college seasons, and had draft pick numbers at most 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.singles_wl = '1–0' AND match_season.college = 'Florida International' AND player.player = 'Cho Soong-Jae (630)' AND player.total_wl = '2–0' AND match_season.draft_pick_number <= 18
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM match_season ms
    WHERE ms.Team = t.Team_id
    AND ms.College = 'Florida International'
    AND ms.Draft_Pick_Number <= 18
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player p
    WHERE p.Team = t.Team_id
    AND p.Singles_WL = '1–0'
    AND p.Player = 'Cho Soong-Jae (630)'
    AND p.Total_WL = '2–0'
)

records.question: Which teams had Kim Young-Jun (474) playing as a Defender in the 1999 MLS College Draft with draft pick number 5, where his singles_wl is 6–3 and doubles_wl is 0–1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.doubles_wl = '0–1' AND match_season.draft_pick_number = 5 AND player.singles_wl = '6–3' AND match_season.draft_class = '1999 MLS College Draft' AND match_season.position = 'Defender' AND player.player = 'Kim Young-Jun (474)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM match_season ms
    WHERE ms.Team = t.Team_id
    AND ms.Draft_Pick_Number = 5
    AND ms.Draft_Class = '1999 MLS College Draft'
    AND ms.Position = 'Defender'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player p
    WHERE p.Team = t.Team_id
    AND p.Doubles_WL = '0–1'
    AND p.Singles_WL = '6–3'
    AND p.Player = 'Kim Young-Jun (474)'
)

records.question: What teams named Miami Fusion played for Duke in the Isle of Man where the official native language is English Manx?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.official_native_language = 'English Manx' AND match_season.college = 'Duke' AND team.name = 'Miami Fusion' AND country.country_name = 'Isle of Man'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
WHERE t.Name = 'Miami Fusion'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM match_season ms
    WHERE ms.Team = t.Team_id
    AND ms.College = 'Duke'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM country c
        WHERE c.Country_id = ms.Country
        AND c.Official_native_language = 'English Manx'
        AND c.Country_name = 'Isle of Man'
    )
)

records.question: Which teams named Miami Fusion have defenders drafted in the 2005 MLS SuperDraft at pick number 9 or fewer from countries where the capital is Washington and the official native language is English?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE team.name = 'Miami Fusion' AND match_season.position = 'Defender' AND country.capital = 'Washington' AND country.official_native_language = 'English' AND match_season.draft_pick_number <= 9 AND match_season.draft_class = '2005 MLS SuperDraft'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
JOIN match_season ms ON t.Team_id = ms.Team
JOIN country c ON ms.Country = c.Country_id
WHERE t.Name = 'Miami Fusion'
AND ms.Position = 'Defender'
AND ms.Draft_Pick_Number <= 9
AND ms.Draft_Class = '2005 MLS SuperDraft'
AND c.Capital = 'Washington'
AND c.Official_native_language = 'English'

records.question: Which teams named Berneice Hand include the player Bae Nam-Ju who played exactly 2 years (1988, 1990), with total wins-losses exactly 1–3, singles wins-losses exactly 0–2, and doubles wins-losses exactly 1–1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.total_wl = '1–3' AND team.name = 'Berneice Hand' AND player.years_played = '2 (1988, 1990)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–2' AND player.player = 'Bae Nam-Ju' AND player.doubles_wl = '1–1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
INNER JOIN player p ON t.Team_id = p.Team
WHERE t.Name = 'Berneice Hand'
  AND p.Total_WL = '1–3'
  AND p.Years_Played = '2 (1988, 1990)'
  AND p.Singles_WL = '0–2'
  AND p.Player = 'Bae Nam-Ju'
  AND p.Doubles_WL = '1–1'

records.question: Which teams have players who played exactly 1 (2011) and where the team name is Columbus Crew?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE team.name = 'Columbus Crew' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)'

SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
INNER JOIN player p ON t.Team_id = p.Team
WHERE t.Name = 'Columbus Crew'
AND p.Years_Played = '1 (2011)'
